# Char Meem Clothing

> Char Meem Clothing (also written "4 Meem Clothing" — "char" means four in Urdu and "meem" is the Arabic letter م) is a premium clothing brand and custom-print studio based in Islamabad, Pakistan. It sells heavyweight ready-made tees, hoodies and sweatshirts, and lets customers design their own custom-printed pieces, printed locally with nationwide delivery across Pakistan.

The brand was founded by four friends who share the initial "M" — the name literally means "four Ms". Its tagline is "Wear your imprint."

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.khudclothes.com/): brand overview and the current drop
- [Shop](https://www.khudclothes.com/shop): all ready-made products by category
- [Customize](https://www.khudclothes.com/customize): the custom-print studio — upload or design artwork, choose garment, size and placement
- [Size Guide](https://www.khudclothes.com/size-guide): garment measurements and fit answers
- [About](https://www.khudclothes.com/about): the story of the four founders

## Facts

- Brand name: Char Meem Clothing (alternate: 4 Meem Clothing, Char Meem)
- Products: heavyweight cotton tees, oversized tees, hoodies, sweatshirts, custom-printed apparel
- Custom orders: printed locally in Pakistan, typically 5–7 business days
- Payment: Cash on Delivery and bank transfer
- Ships: Pakistan-wide from Islamabad
- Currency: PKR (Pakistani Rupee)
